query:
SELECT r.id as room_id, r.room_number, r.property_id, q.id as qr_code_id, p.name as property_name
FROM peppr_rooms r
JOIN peppr_qr_codes q ON q.room_id = r.id
JOIN peppr_properties p ON p.id = r.property_id
WHERE r.status = 'active' AND q.status = 'active'
ORDER BY p.name, r.room_number
LIMIT 40;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute

FROM peppr_rooms r

JOIN peppr_properties p ON p.id = r.property_id
WHERE r.status = 'active' AND q.status = 'active'
ORDER BY p.name, r.room_number
LIMIT 40;
